title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) Through the Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Enter Into a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) Among Los Baños Municipal Police Station, National Police 4a Laguna Police Provincial Office and Liga ng mga Barangay for the Monitoring and Evaluation of the Peace and Order and Public Safety Plan (POPS PLAN) for Its Effective Implementation: Councilor Benedicto S. Alborida 02/06/2023
